markets.no_sub_title: Tie
markets.rules_primary: If Tie wins the Olimpia vs Luqueno professional APF Division de Honor soccer game originally scheduled for Mar 17, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Olimpia vs Luqueno professional APF Division de Honor soccer game originally scheduled for Mar 17, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties).
